title: Cyclic Code Generation and Error Detection Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps involved in encoding a dataword into a codeword using a generator polynomial and the subsequent error detection process on the receiver's end.
relationships: Dataword is input to Encoding Process with Generator Polynomial to create Codeword
Codeword is transmitted and potentially corrupted, becoming Received Bitstream
Received Bitstream is divided by Generator Polynomial to calculate Syndrome
Zero Syndrome leads to Error-Free Data; Non-Zero Syndrome leads to Error Detected
